title: Security ROI + Investment + Budget — Portfolio ROI Verified-Outcome Pipeline
description: test_security_roi.py, test_security_investment_engine.py, and test_security_budget_engine.py cluster together. security_investment_engine computes portfolio ROI with verified-outcome detection and over_budget flag. security_budget_engine tracks allocations and spend. Gap: verified outcomes are manually recorded — there is no automation that detects a security control prevented an incident and marks the investment outcome as verified.
missing: Automated outcome verification: when incident_cost_engine records zero incidents of a type that a control addresses, auto-mark the investment outcome as verified with the avoided_cost computation

Budget vs actual sync: pull actual spend from security_budget_engine and compare against security_investment_engine budget projections in a unified /api/v1/security-investment/budget-vs-actual endpoint
ROI executive report: generate a quarterly ROI report card showing top-5 ROI investments and bottom-5 underperforming investments
